# GitHub repository metadata

Use these values when configuring the repository on GitHub.

## Repository name

```
prism-logging-standard
```

## Short description (About)

```
An open standard for logging AI reasoning decisions — value, evidence, and source hierarchies — as structured one-line codes, for regulatory compliance and behavioral auditability.
```

## Website

```
https://aioq.org
```

## Topics (GitHub "Add topics")

Recommended (search-optimized, no overreach):

```
ai-safety
ai-audit
ai-governance
ai-compliance
llm
responsible-ai
eu-ai-act
logging
audit-log
prism
schwartz-values
behavioral-auditability
open-standard
```

## License

MIT (already in LICENSE)

## Includes the following files on front page

- README.md (main)
- LICENSE (MIT)
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- CHANGELOG.md
- DISCLAIMER.md

## Social preview

Recommended: a simple image with text:

```
PRISM Logging Standard v1.0
An open standard for AI reasoning logs
C:MD/IXi | V:Ben<Sel | E:Exp<Gui | S:Usr<Pro
aioq.org
```

## Branch protection (recommended for public repo)

- Protect `main` branch
- Require pull request reviews before merge
- Require status checks to pass
- Restrict direct pushes to `main`

## Release tag for v1.0

```
v1.0.0
```

Release title: `PRISM Logging Standard v1.0`

Release notes: copy from CHANGELOG.md v1.0 section.
